Digital Voting for India

A blockchain-powered citizen governance platform ensuring tamper-proof elections, verified voter identity, and complete transparency in democratic participation.

Why Choose AGORA?

Built for a secure and transparent democratic process

Immutable Records

Every vote is permanently recorded on the blockchain. No tampering, no alteration, no deletion — ever.

Voter Privacy

Your vote remains anonymous. Advanced cryptographic techniques ensure complete ballot secrecy.

Instant Counting

Real-time, transparent vote tallying. Results are verifiable on the public blockchain ledger.

Citizen-Friendly

Simple and accessible interface designed for every Indian citizen to participate with ease.

Auditable

Complete audit trail available for election observers. Trust through full transparency.

Scalable

From panchayat elections to national polls — the system scales to serve any level of governance.

How It Works

Three simple steps to cast your vote securely

01

Register & Verify

Submit your Aadhaar and Voter ID. Admin verifies your identity. One-time process.

02

Authenticate & Vote

Login with OTP and MPIN. Browse active elections and cast your ballot securely.

03

View Results

Results are tallied in real-time on the blockchain. Fully transparent and verifiable.

Your Vote. Your Voice. Your Future.

Join the digital governance revolution. Secure, transparent, and accessible to every citizen.
